issues.description: Second action applies −2000 power unconditionally, but card text requires condition 'if you have 1 or less Life cards'. Condition must gate this action.
Condition type 'TurnCount' with max:0 is incorrect and nonsensical. The conditional 'if you have 1 or less Life cards' requires condition type 'LifeCount' or equivalent, not TurnCount.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and DrawCard action has no basis in card text. This effect should not exist.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for the conditional −2000 power action per 'during this turn', but structure is broken due to condition placement.
